title: Chargeback status chip
description: Composite chip showing the chargeback's overall state — combines status + optional RDR-eligible indicator + optional CE3-eligible indicator into a single at-a-glance signal. Colour + icon + text label. Never colour-alone. Priority order: 'Lost' > 'Expired' > 'Won' > 'Accepted refund' > 'Under bank review' > 'Evidence submitted' > 'Pending evidence'.

rdrEligible.description: When status='pending_evidence' + rdrEligible=true, show an 'RDR available' variant.

ce3Eligible.description: When status IN ('pending_evidence', 'evidence_submitted') + ce3Eligible=true, show a 'CE3.0 available' variant.

variant.$expr: ({ pending_evidence: 'warning', evidence_submitted: 'accent', under_bank_review: 'accent', won: 'success', lost: 'danger', expired: 'danger', accepted_refund: 'neutral' })[props.status]

leadingIcon.$expr: props.showIcon ? ({ pending_evidence: 'clock', evidence_submitted: 'document-check', under_bank_review: 'building-library', won: 'check-circle', lost: 'x-circle', expired: 'exclamation-triangle', accepted_refund: 'arrow-uturn-left' })[props.status] : null

children.$expr: ({ pending_evidence: 'Pending evidence', evidence_submitted: 'Evidence submitted', under_bank_review: 'Under bank review', won: 'Won', lost: 'Lost', expired: 'Expired', accepted_refund: 'Accepted refund' })[props.status]
